title: Did the doctors find out how the woman died?

meanings.usage: 指经过防腐处理的古代尸体，尤指古埃及人的干尸
指医生为治疗或检查而进行的手术操作
一种从植物或合成得到的黏稠物质，这里指包裹木乃伊的硬树脂
进行科学实验或研究的地方，常简写为lab
指人像或塑像，如wax figure表示蜡像
指在危险或困难中存活下来，或经历了某事后仍然存在
形容很少见或不普通的事物
指身体或心理上的疾病或不适
宗教崇拜的场所，这里指古埃及的神庙
指整体中的某一个部分或切片
指将某物从原位置移走或取下
用于引出好的或幸运的结果
这里指X光片，用于医学检查的成像板
指用刀或其他工具将某物切开
指某物分裂成许多小部分

examples.en: The doctors have been trying to find out whether the woman died of a rare disease.
examples.zh: 医生们一直在试图查明这名女子是否死于一种罕见疾病。

examples.en: Please find out what time the train leaves.
examples.zh: 请查一下火车什么时候出发。

examples.en: The doctors wanted to know how the woman died of a rare disease.
examples.zh: 医生们想知道这名女子是如何死于一种罕见疾病的。

examples.en: He died of cancer last year.
examples.zh: 他去年死于癌症。

examples.en: The operation lasted for over four hours.
examples.zh: 手术持续了四个多小时。

examples.en: The meeting lasted for two hours.
examples.zh: 会议持续了两个小时。

examples.en: The operation proved to be very difficult because of the hard resin.
examples.zh: 由于坚硬的树脂，手术变得非常困难。

examples.en: We cancelled the trip because of the bad weather.
examples.zh: 由于天气不好，我们取消了旅行。

examples.en: The doctors removed a section of the mummy and sent it to a laboratory.
examples.zh: 医生们取出木乃伊的一部分送到实验室。

examples.en: Please remove your shoes from the carpet.
examples.zh: 请把你的鞋子从地毯上拿走。

examples.en: They feared that the mummy would fall to pieces when they cut it open.
examples.zh: 他们担心当切开木乃伊时，它会碎成碎片。

examples.en: The old book fell to pieces when I touched it.
examples.zh: 那本旧书我一碰就碎成了碎片。

examples.en: The doctors have not yet decided how the woman died.
examples.zh: 医生们还没有确定这名女子是如何死的。

examples.en: I have not yet finished my homework.
examples.zh: 我还没有完成作业。

examples.en: Doctors have been trying to find out the cause of death.
examples.zh: 医生们一直在试图找出死因。

examples.en: She tried to open the door but it was locked.
examples.zh: 她试图打开门，但门锁着。

examples.en: This god was normally placed inside a mummy.
examples.zh: 这个神通常被放在木乃伊内部。

examples.en: The key was placed inside the drawer.
examples.zh: 钥匙被放在抽屉里面。

phrases.usage: 手术成功，经历手术存活下来

examples.en: The mummy successfully survived the operation.
examples.zh: 木乃伊成功挺过了这次手术。

examples.en: The patient survived the surgery.
examples.zh: 病人手术成功活了下来。

grammar.title: 现在完成时（Present Perfect Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的行为或情况对现在有影响，或表示从过去持续到现在的动作。常与already, yet, just, ever, never等时间状语连用。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去发生但与现在相关的事情，或表示一个从过去开始并可能继续下去的动作。have been + doing表示现在完成进行时，强调动作的持续性。

examples.en: The doctors have not yet decided how the woman died.
examples.zh: 医生们还没有决定这名女子是如何死的。

examples.en: The doctors have been trying to find out whether she died of a rare disease.
examples.zh: 医生们一直在试图查明她是否死于一种罕见疾病。

examples.en: I have already finished my homework.
examples.zh: 我已经完成作业了。

grammar.title: 过去分词作定语（Past Participle as Adjective）
grammar.definition: 过去分词作定语时，表示已完成的动作或被动意义，通常前置或后置修饰名词。
grammar.structure: 名词 + 过去分词 或 过去分词 + 名词
grammar.usage: 用于描述名词的状态或已经完成的动作。taken是take的过去分词，这里作后置定语修饰plates。

examples.en: There were strange marks on the X-ray plates taken of the mummy.
examples.zh: 在给木乃伊拍摄的X光片上有奇怪的痕迹。

examples.en: The books bought yesterday are on the table.
examples.zh: 昨天买的书在桌子上。

examples.en: The letter received this morning is from my mother.
examples.zh: 今天早上收到的信是我妈妈寄来的。

grammar.title: 定语从句（Relative Clause）
grammar.definition: 用来修饰名词或代词的从句，由关系代词（who, which, that等）或关系副词（where, when, why等）引导。
grammar.structure: 名词/代词 + 关系代词/副词 + 从句
grammar.usage: 用于对名词进行补充说明或限制。which引导非限制性定语从句，修饰主句中的整个句子或某个名词。

examples.en: The operation, which lasted for over four hours, proved to be very difficult.
examples.zh: 手术持续了四个多小时，结果证明非常困难。

examples.en: The god which has the head of a cow was normally placed inside a mummy.
examples.zh: 这个有着牛头的神通常被放在木乃伊内部。

examples.en: The woman who died in 800 B.C. was a singer in the Temple of Thebes.
examples.zh: 这位死于公元前800年的女子是底比斯神庙的一名歌手。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The + 名词 + is that of + 名字/身份

original.en: The mummy is that of Shepenmut who was once a singer in the Temple of Thebes.
original.zh: 这具木乃伊是希彭穆特的，她曾是底比斯神庙的一名歌手。

imitations.en: The house is that of Mr. Smith who works in our company.
imitations.zh: 这栋房子是史密斯先生的，他在我们公司工作。

imitations.en: The book is that of the famous writer who won the Nobel Prize.
imitations.zh: 这本书是那位获得诺贝尔奖的著名作家的。

sentencePatterns.pattern: have been + doing something + 时间状语

original.en: The doctors have been trying to find out whether the woman died of a rare disease.
original.zh: 医生们一直在试图查明这名女子是否死于一种罕见疾病。

imitations.en: We have been waiting for you for two hours.
imitations.zh: 我们已经等了你两个小时了。

imitations.en: She has been studying English since 2020.
imitations.zh: 她从2020年起一直在学英语。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The + 名词 + 谓语 + because of + 名词/动名词

original.en: The operation proved to be very difficult because of the hard resin which covered the skin.
original.zh: 由于覆盖皮肤的硬树脂，手术变得非常困难。

imitations.en: The match was cancelled because of the heavy rain.
He failed the exam because of his carelessness.
imitations.zh: 他因为粗心考试没通过。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词 + something + which + 定语从句

original.en: They also found something which the X-ray plates did not show: a small wax figure of the god Duamutef.
original.zh: 他们还发现了X光片没有显示的东西：一个杜阿穆特夫神的小蜡像。

imitations.en: I bought something which I really needed: a new computer.
imitations.zh: 我买了些我真正需要的东西：一台新电脑。

imitations.en: She told me something which changed my life: she was leaving.
imitations.zh: 她告诉我了一件改变我一生的事：她要离开了。
